description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a robust, dark metal barrel and a wooden stock and fore-end. The stock is full-sized, featuring a contoured cheek rest and a visible butt pad, while the fore-end is ribbed for grip. The shotgun has a tubular magazine running beneath the barrel and a visible trigger guard with a rounded, elongated shape. A black carrying strap is attached, running from the stock to the fore-end, suggesting portability. The overall finish is matte with a mix of dark metal and reddish-brown wood, and the design is utilitarian, suitable for urban or tactical use.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel, wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and a black carrying strap.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the strap running alongside.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, long barrel, and attached strap, highlighting the pump-action mechanism.
description_view_2: Viewed from the butt end, the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and strap are visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and action mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and round with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated, medium size, smooth with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
